disease.action.black_sigatoka: Apply propiconazole fungicide. Remove and burn infected leaves.
disease.action.bract_mosaic_virus: No cure. Remove infected plants. Control aphid vectors.
disease.action.healthy: Plant is healthy. Continue routine monitoring.
disease.action.insect_pest_damage: Apply appropriate insecticide. Use pheromone traps.
disease.action.moko_disease: Destroy infected plants immediately. Disinfect tools. Quarantine field.
disease.action.panama_disease: No chemical cure. Remove and destroy plants. Use resistant varieties.
disease.action.yellow_sigatoka: Apply copper-based fungicide. Prune lower leaves.
disease.action.cercospora: Apply copper-based fungicide. Remove fallen infected leaves.
disease.action.miner: Apply systemic insecticide. Remove heavily mined leaves.
disease.action.phoma: Apply copper or mancozeb fungicide. Improve drainage.
disease.action.rust: Apply triazole or copper fungicide immediately. Prune dense canopy.
disease.action.blight: Apply azoxystrobin fungicide. Rotate crops next season.
disease.action.common_rust: Apply triazole fungicide early. Use resistant hybrids.
disease.action.gray_leaf_spot: Rotate crops. Apply strobilurin fungicide at first sign.
disease.action.anthracnose: Apply mancozeb or carbendazim. Prune for air circulation.
disease.action.bacterial_canker: Prune infected parts. Apply copper bactericide. Disinfect tools.
disease.action.cutting_weevil: Apply contact insecticide. Remove and destroy affected shoots.
disease.action.die_back: Prune 15cm below infection. Apply copper fungicide on cuts.
disease.action.gall_midge: Apply systemic insecticide at bud break. Remove galled tissue.
disease.action.powdery_mildew: Apply wettable sulfur or difenoconazole at early onset.
disease.action.sooty_mould: Control mealybugs and scale insects. Wash leaves with soapy water.
disease.action.bacterial_leaf_blight: Drain fields. Apply copper bactericide. Use resistant varieties.
disease.action.bacterial_leaf_streak: Improve drainage. Apply copper bactericide. Avoid leaf wetness.
disease.action.bacterial_panicle_blight: Apply copper bactericide at heading. Avoid excess nitrogen.
disease.action.blast: Apply tricyclazole immediately. Avoid excess nitrogen fertiliser.
disease.action.brown_spot: Apply mancozeb or iprodione. Ensure adequate potassium nutrition.
disease.action.dead_heart: Apply carbofuran or chlorpyrifos for stem borer control.
disease.action.downy_mildew: Apply metalaxyl or mancozeb. Improve field drainage.
disease.action.hispa: Apply chlorpyrifos or quinalphos. Remove affected tillers.
disease.action.tungro: No cure. Destroy infected plants. Control leafhopper vectors urgently.
crop.reason.rice: High humidity, warm temperature, and adequate rainfall match rice requirements.
crop.reason.wheat: Cool temperatures and moderate rainfall are ideal for wheat cultivation.
crop.reason.maize: Warm temperatures, moderate humidity, and good rainfall suit maize growth.
crop.reason.tomato: Moderate temperature and humidity with good potassium levels support tomatoes.
crop.reason.banana: High temperature, humidity, and potassium-rich soil create perfect banana conditions.
crop.reason.chickpea: Dry conditions and cooler temperatures with low nitrogen match chickpea needs.
crop.reason.cotton: Hot dry climate with moderate rainfall suits cotton cultivation.
crop.reason.jute: High humidity and warm temperature favour jute fibre production.
crop.reason.coffee: Mild temperature, high humidity, and acidic soil create ideal coffee conditions.
crop.reason.mango: Tropical heat, dry winters, and deep soil support mango fruiting.
crop.reason.grapes: Warm dry summers and well-drained soil are perfect for grape cultivation.
crop.reason.watermelon: High heat, moderate moisture, and sandy loam soil suit watermelon growth.
crop.reason.papaya: Tropical warmth, high humidity, and fertile soil accelerate papaya growth.
crop.reason.coconut: Sandy coastal soil, high humidity, and warm temperatures favour coconut.
crop.reason.lentil: Cool dry climate and low nitrogen soil are ideal for lentils.
crop.reason.blackgram: Warm humid conditions and moderate rainfall suit blackgram.
crop.reason.mungbean: Warm weather and well-drained loamy soil support mungbean.
crop.reason.mothbeans: Very drought-tolerant — thrives in sandy, arid soils.
crop.reason.pigeonpeas: Semi-arid climate and well-drained soils suit pigeonpeas.
crop.reason.kidneybeans: Moderate temperatures and well-drained fertile soil suit kidney beans.
alert.extreme_uv: Extreme UV Index ({uv}) — avoid field work 10am–4pm
alert.high_uv: High UV Index ({uv}) — use sun protection
alert.high_rain: High rain probability ({rain}%) today — delay harvesting
alert.frost_risk: Low temperature {temp}°C — frost risk for sensitive crops
alert.high_humidity: High humidity {hum}% — elevated fungal disease risk

disease.camera_hint: Centre the leaf in the guide box
disease.camera_not_supported: Camera not supported in this browser
disease.camera_denied: Camera permission denied — allow access in browser settings
disease.camera_not_found: No camera found on this device
disease.upload_image_hint: Upload a leaf image to continue
disease.hint_not_leaf: No plant material detected. Please upload a clear photo of a crop leaf — not a face, room, or other object.
disease.hint_blurry: Hold the camera steady and retake. Good lighting helps — try moving closer to the leaf.
disease.hint_dark: Move to better lighting. Avoid shooting in shade or indoors without light.
disease.hint_exposed: Avoid direct sunlight on the camera lens. Move to soft, indirect light.
disease.hint_small: Use a higher resolution image — at least 80×80 pixels.
